examples: To make a sapphire crystal, the basic material used is a salt cleansed from any foreign body (ammoniacal alum).
A study for leaching of a low grade and difficult to separate copper ore was performed by using ammoniacal pressure leaching method.
Skim serum is an industrial effluent from rubber factories. It is of higher BOD and contains about 1% protein and 0.05-0.3% ammoniacal nitrogen, etc.
